evals.name: full-sweep
evals.expected_output: Full refactoring applying all testing rules

assertions.trap: Manual cleanup() import in Vitest
assertions.description: No manual cleanup() in Vitest — automatic. Keep only vi.restoreAllMocks()

assertions.trap: mockDb declared before vi.mock but used in factory scope
assertions.description: Use vi.hoisted() for variables inside vi.mock() factory

assertions.trap: test2 depends on sharedUser from test1
assertions.description: No test-to-test dependencies; explicit setup per test

assertions.trap: test1, test2, test3 as test names
assertions.description: Descriptive names with scenario + expected outcome

assertions.trap: toMatchSnapshot() instead of specific assertions
assertions.description: Assert specific values, not snapshots (maintenance trap)

assertions.trap: toBeTruthy() instead of specific matcher
assertions.description: Specific matchers over generic equality/truthiness

assertions.trap: EmailService (internal collaborator) mocked
assertions.description: Mock at boundaries only (network, DB), never internal collaborators

assertions.trap: Hardcoded test data objects
assertions.description: Factory functions for test data, not fixtures

assertions.trap: page.click(selector) deprecated API
assertions.description: page.locator(selector).click() not page.click()

assertions.trap: waitForTimeout(2000/3000/1000) everywhere
assertions.description: Zero sleep: wait for network/UI state, never waitForTimeout

assertions.trap: CSS class selectors (.product-card, #name)
assertions.description: User-centric selectors: getByRole, getByLabel, not CSS classes

assertions.trap: Real Stripe API call in test
assertions.description: Mock third-party services with page.route() interception

assertions.trap: Raw selectors/actions inline in tests
assertions.description: Page Object Model for reusable test abstractions

assertions.trap: cancel order test depends on checkout test state
assertions.description: Independent tests with fresh context, no shared state

assertions.trap: page.$() + toBeNull() instead of web-first expect
assertions.description: Web-first assertions: expect(locator).toBeVisible() with auto-retry

assertions.trap: UI-driven precondition setup in checkout
assertions.description: API seeding for preconditions, don't drive UI to create test data

assertions.trap: test4 accesses private internals (_cache, _retryCount) via (service as any)
assertions.description: Test behavior not implementation — never access private internals

assertions.trap: test5 asserts typeof checks that TypeScript already guarantees
assertions.description: Don't test what types guarantee (typeof checks on typed values)

assertions.trap: Playwright config has trace/video/screenshot set to 'on' (always) instead of retain-on-failure
assertions.description: Capture video/traces/screenshots on failure only (trace: 'retain-on-failure')

evals.name: tdd-workflow-review
evals.expected_output: Review identifying all TDD workflow violations

assertions.trap: All 6 tests written at once (horizontal slicing)
assertions.description: Vertical slices: one test → one impl → repeat, not batch

assertions.trap: All tests first then all implementation
assertions.description: Tracer bullet: one thin slice end-to-end first

assertions.trap: Refactoring calculateTotal while tests are failing
assertions.description: Never refactor during RED — only when GREEN

assertions.trap: Plan to implement all methods at once
assertions.description: Write only enough code to pass the current test

evals.name: new-patterns-sweep
evals.expected_output: Full refactoring applying all new testing rules

assertions.trap: vi.mock("node-fetch") instead of MSW
assertions.description: Use MSW for network mocking, not vi.mock on fetch/axios

assertions.trap: Only happy path tests, no zero/boundary/error cases
assertions.description: ZOMBIES mnemonic: test Zero, One, Many, Boundaries, Interfaces, Exceptions, Simple

assertions.trap: fireEvent.click() and fireEvent.change() in RTL
assertions.description: userEvent over fireEvent -- simulates real browser event sequence

assertions.trap: Real Stripe API call in test without contract testing
assertions.description: Contract tests with MSW for external API boundaries, never call real APIs

assertions.trap: Hardcoded coverage thresholds (80/80/80/80)
assertions.description: Coverage as ratchet (autoUpdate: true), not hardcoded threshold

assertions.trap: toMatchSnapshot() on HTML content instead of toHaveScreenshot()
assertions.description: Visual regression: toHaveScreenshot() not toMatchSnapshot() on HTML

assertions.trap: retries: 3 in Playwright config with no explanatory comment
assertions.description: Flag unexplained retries in config -- retries mask real regressions

assertions.trap: 5 near-identical formatCurrency tests differing only in input
assertions.description: test.each for data-driven tests instead of duplicated test bodies

assertions.trap: General awareness -- should mention test pyramid if advising on test strategy
assertions.description: Test pyramid ratios: ~70% unit, ~20% integration, ~10% E2E
